title: Reformulating Key-Information Extraction as Next Sentence Prediction for Hierarchical Data
summary: Reformulating Key-Information Extraction for hierarchical tables as Next-Sentence Prediction to improve information extraction from complex documents.
venue: International Conference on Document Analysis and Recognition

title: Incremental Learning for a Flexible CAD System Design
summary: Mitigating Catastrophic Forgetting through auxiliary task representations to enable incremental class learning in medical imaging systems.

title: Manifold Learning to address Catastrophic Forgetting
summary: Addressing Catastrophic Forgetting in medical CAD systems through manifold learning, enabling adaptation across sequential datasets from different imaging sources.
venue: Indian Conference on Computer Vision, Graphics and Image Processing

title: A Clinically Inspired Approach for Melanoma classification
summary: Improving melanoma detection in CAD systems through Intra-Patient Comparative Analysis to identify outlier lesions and boost diagnostic accuracy.
